title: stemona tuberosa var. tuberosa
intro: Stemona tuberosa var. tuberosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonaceae, commonly known as the 'Lesser or Greater Yaw Teow' and also known as 'Kut-Ki' in traditional Chinese medicine. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stemona tuberosa var. tuberosa include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tonics, and can also be found in various traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
